channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog fouling, 4th March
item.description:
The pathway leading up to the school gates is always full of dog poo that owners don’t clean up after their dogs. It’s affecting the children and parents going in and out of school a lot.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing tiles, 4th March
item.description:
Missing Tiles trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Devonshire Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Flytiped items, 4th March
item.description:
Various items left in small closed off carpark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandway Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Outside westbere house bin area rubbish and bins overflowing,and flytip, 4th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish by bins and bin overflowing , outside westbere house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gallants Farm Road, Barnet, EN4, 4th March
item.description:
EVERYTHING is wrong with Gallants Farm Road, Barnet, EN4. The whole road is littered with potholes here, there, and everywhere. And the ONLY way to fix this dangerous, outstanding issue, is through a programme of staged resurfacing for the whole road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Gallants Farm Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 cm pothole on the bend towards the railway bridge., 4th March
item.description:
The road surface has been deteriorating for the last year & now there are lots of pot holes along that whole stretch of road (where it wasn't resurfaced a year ago).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Vicarage Crescent, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large spray paint graffiti tagging on footpath/cycle lane, 4th March
item.description:
Enormous section of footpath & cycle lane covered in new section of tagging - London Fields - difficult to photograph as so big an area!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Martello Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Animal waste, 4th March
item.description:
Animal farmyard waste …

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Howard Lodge Road, Navestock, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged car, 4th March
item.description:
An unfamiliar damaged car has been parked outside of my mum's house for a week. It has a bar code on the bonnet and writing on the screen. Is this abandoned. Registration NL73 AOE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appledore Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Biffa bins, 4th March
item.description:
Biffa bins on the pavement if not on the pavement they are saving parking spaces for people that work in the pub and hostel...there's not enough parking spaces for the people that live here
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesterfield Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped single mattress, 4th March
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge potholes up and down the road, 4th March
item.description:
Potholes have been growing for years and the state of the road now makes it unusable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 234, St John's Way, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 51-57 Killyon pavement blocked, 4th March
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Killyon Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole infront of 36 Longleigh Lane, 4th March
item.description:
The pothole has been present for some time and was previously circled by a member of staff, indicating that it had been identified for repair. However, no further action has been taken since then. The pothole is continuing to increase in size and is becoming progressively worse. This is now affecting both road users and my household. Vehicles are having to manoeuvre around it, and it is particularly problematic for us when reversing into our driveway, as it poses a risk of damage to vehicles and creates a safety concern. I would appreciate it if this matter could be addressed as soon as possible and the necessary repairs carried out before the situation deteriorates further.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Longleigh Lane, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin. Not being collected., 4th March
item.description:
The bin pictured has been in this position, abandoned, for a few months. It's not getting collected and noone knows who's responsibility it is.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushford Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cones on road o/s 104 - 106 Crayford Way, 4th March
item.description:
There are cones being placed around vehicles on Crayford Way . It is making it dangerous for cars passing by.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post of climbing bit missing & loose, 4th March
item.description:
Loose post and missing one on the kids climbing bit in riverside gardens playpark. If not seen by parent will result in a child hurting themself and falling from 3ft height.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 187, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing machine and wheelie bin, 4th March
item.description:
There is an abandoned washing machine on Walworth Place (near the corner of Cadiz Street) as well as a brown wheelie bin on the opposite corner.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 305, Walworth Place, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Hi 3 sacks of sawdust and timber dumber in front of numbers 13-14 West Bank N16

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Bank, Hackney, London

item.title: A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found, 4th March
